scripts.setup: mise trust && eval "$(mise activate zsh)" && mise setup
scripts.run: echo "Starting on http://localhost:$CONDUCTOR_PORT" && CHATTO_WEBSERVER_URL=http://localhost:$CONDUCTOR_PORT CHATTO_WEBSERVER_PORT=$CONDUCTOR_PORT CHATTO_NATS_EMBEDDED_PORT=0 CHATTO_BOOTSTRAP_LOGIN=hmans CHATTO_BOOTSTRAP_EMAIL=hendrik@mans.de CHATTO_BOOTSTRAP_PASSWORD=devpassword CHATTO_BOOTSTRAP_SPACE_NAME=Chatto CHATTO_LIVEKIT_ENABLED=true CHATTO_LIVEKIT_URL=ws://localhost:7880 CHATTO_LIVEKIT_API_KEY=devkey CHATTO_LIVEKIT_API_SECRET=secret mise chatto run
